name: Abalone Edge-on Galaxy
description: You have been assigned the Abalone Edge-on Galaxy — a majestic Sombrero-class spiral seen edge-on, its iridescent blues and greens shimmering like mother-of-pearl. A massive bronze dust lane bisects the central bulge, revealing complex, lustrous structures within the core disk that rival the beauty of the finest abalone shell.

attributes.value: Bronze dust lane revealing mother-of-pearl core structures
